name: @aprimediet/permission-modes
description: Claude-Code-style permission modes (ask / plan / auto) for the pi coding agent — with per-mode model profiles, outside-cwd write tracking, and per-mode skill filtering.

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const pkg=require('./package.json'); if(!pkg.files||pkg.files.length===0){console.error('files field empty — abort');process.exit(1)}; console.log('Publishing '+pkg.name+'@'+pkg.version+' with files:', pkg.files)"
